stock.label: Mission Cutout Stock Image
stock.notes: Current approved stock image for the mission cutout.

candidates.label: Nano Mission Cutout Candidate
candidates.prompt:
{
  "asset_type": "homepage mission cutout image",
  "business_context": "Rally Technology, a Taiwanese industrial automation and control integration company",
  "page_role": "Homepage Mission section fixed cutout image",
  "goal": "Create a photorealistic engineering portrait image with a strong silhouette, believable industrial context, and refined breakout potential",
  "visual_message": "A capable engineer in a real industrial setting, composed for a premium website cutout treatment rather than a generic stock portrait",
  "recipe_ids": [
    "technical-signal-stack",
    "named-visual-standard",
    "color-material-control",
    "artifact-rescue"
  ],
  "reference_usage": {
    "image_1": "preserve the strong torso-and-head silhouette and cutout-ready crop",
    "image_2": "optional industrial realism reference"
  },
  "technical_signals": {
    "lens": "85mm commercial portrait photography",
    "aperture": "f/2.8",
    "light_source": "controlled industrial ambient light with subtle edge separation",
    "time_of_day": "neutral indoor or shaded daylight",
    "motion_rule": "calm, steady portrait stance"
  },
  "spatial_positioning": [
    "single subject dominates the frame",
    "background stays soft and non-distracting",
    "hands or equipment cue can support realism",
    "silhouette remains clean enough for later cutout treatment"
  ],
  "visual_standard": "premium commercial engineering portrait photography",
  "color_restriction": "restrained industrial neutrals, workwear blues, muted metal tones, and realistic skin tones",
  "material_notes": [
    "real workwear fabrics",
    "believable PPE or engineering accessories if present",
    "clean skin texture",
    "no plastic highlights"
  ],
  "scene": "A real engineer or technician in a credible industrial environment, framed for a strong breakout silhouette and premium website presentation",
  "subject": "One subject is the hero, with industrial context kept supportive and secondary",
  "reality_anchors": [
    "credible engineer portrait",
    "real industrial environment",
    "clear cutout-friendly silhouette",
    "commercially usable subject crop"
  ],
  "composition": {
    "format": "4:5",
    "hero_safe_area": "not required",
    "focal_structure": "one dominant subject with minimal background noise",
    "camera": "commercial subject-led portrait photography",
    "cropping": "designed for later masking or breakout treatment"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "style": "premium commercial engineering portrait photography",
    "mood": "capable, steady, trustworthy",
    "contrast": "controlled and clear enough for subject separation",
    "surface_behavior": "real fabric, skin, and equipment texture response"
  },
  "commercial_constraints": [
    "must feel suitable for a refined B2B website",
    "must be photorealistic",
    "must support breakout or cutout treatment",
    "must avoid generic office portrait energy",
    "must not contain text or UI"
  ],
  "avoid": [
    "group shot",
    "fashion editorial styling",
    "dramatic action pose",
    "headline text or signage focus",
    "beauty-retouched skin",
    "obvious AI artifacts"
  ]
}
candidates.notes: Pro baseline round 1 for homepage-wide compare, calibrated v2 prompt
